patches.summary: Align CLI, bundled MCP, User-Agent, and GoReleaser version surfaces with release 1.1.2.
patches.reason: The installed Go module was v1.1.2, but --version and agent-context still reported 1.0.0 because direct go-install builds do not inject release ldflags and the GoReleaser ldflag path was stale.

patches.summary: Align generated CLI commands and spec with live body contracts for contact tags, invoices, notifications, and automations.
patches.reason: The generated CLI spec had drifted from the live API validators: contact tag add required tagIds[], invoice create requires items, notification userId is optional with push/url supported, and automation kind defaults to native.

patches.summary: Remove stale static tool manifest and point the repo skill at the maintained CLI install path.
patches.reason: Runtime discovery now comes from the Cobra command tree via agent-context; the old static tools-manifest.json still advertised stale contracts and the skill pointed at the legacy Printing Press tree.
